errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.reportText: Please help us improve by reporting this error on
errorBoundary.copyInstructions: Copy and paste the following error message to include it as part of your submission:

costrictCli.title: CoStrict CLI
costrictCli.help: CoStrict CLI terminal. Use Tab to reach toolbar actions and the terminal input. Standard typing and clipboard shortcuts continue to work inside the terminal.

loading.title: CoStrict CLI
loading.description: Code snippets and selected file paths can be sent to CLI.

restartConfirm.title: Restart CoStrict CLI?
restartConfirm.description: This will restart the current CoStrict CLI session in this tab. Terminal output will be cleared while the CLI starts again.

startError.genericDescription: Restart the CLI. If it still fails, check whether the "cs" command is available in your shell PATH.
startError.missingCliDescription: CoStrict CLI is not installed or not available in PATH.
startError.startupTimeout: CoStrict CLI started, but the local service did not become ready in time.
startError.startupTimeoutDescription: The local service took too long to become ready.
startError.missingCliHint: After installation, reopen or restart this tab.
startError.retryHint: You can restart CoStrict CLI from this panel.

exited.title: CoStrict CLI has exited
exited.description: The CLI process in this tab has stopped. Restart CoStrict CLI to start a new session here.

success.imageDataUriCopied: Image data URI copied to clipboard

confirmation.deleteMessageOrRollback: Delete Message or Restore the checkpoint
confirmation.deleteWarning: Deleting this message will delete all subsequent messages in the conversation. Do you want to proceed?
confirmation.editWarning: Editing this message will delete all subsequent messages in the conversation. Do you want to proceed?
confirmation.editQuestionWithCheckpoint: Editing this message will delete all later messages in the conversation. Do you also want to undo all changes back to this checkpoint?
confirmation.deleteQuestionWithCheckpoint: Deleting this message will delete all later messages in the conversation. Do you also want to undo all changes back to this checkpoint?

errors.wait_checkpoint_long_time: Waited {{timeout}} seconds for checkpoint initialization. If you don't need the checkpoint feature, please turn it off in <settingsLink>the checkpoint settings</settingsLink>.
errors.init_checkpoint_fail_long_time: Checkpoint initialization has taken more than {{timeout}} seconds, so checkpoints are disabled for this task. You can disable checkpoints or extend the waiting time in <settingsLink>the checkpoint settings</settingsLink>.
errors.attempt_completion_tool_failed: Cannot execute attempt_completion because a previous tool call failed in this turn. Please address the tool failure before attempting completion.
